name: Gammacor
description: Designed to quickly vaporize minerals for content analysis, users discovered its powerful beam was equally efficient at dispatching hostiles.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Designed to quickly vaporize minerals for content analysis, users discovered its powerful beam was equally efficient at dispatching hostiles.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

patchlogs.name: Update 30.5: Sisters of Parvos
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Gammacor beam offsets when riding a K-Drive.

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Update 30.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed arm cannon type (Epitaph, Gammacor, Atomos) reticle area being blocked by a part of Zephyr Harrier's shoulder element.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Hotfix 30.0.7
patchlogs.changes: Added updated wrist-mounted weapon animations (ie Gammacor, Epitaph, Atomos, etc).

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed arm mounted Secondaries (Atomos, Gammacor, etc) not playing custom idle animations. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1082719-arm-mounted-secondaries-broken-animation-thigh-holster-problem/

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.5.0
patchlogs.changes: Cleaned up Gammacor and Staticor FX.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.7 + 24.2.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixes towards lingering beam FX when becoming Knocked Down with the Synoid Gammacor.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Update 23.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a missing idle animation for the Gammacor.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.14.0
patchlogs.changes: Synoid Gammacor damage reduced from 20 to 19 in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.13.3
patchlogs.changes: Minor tweaks to reload timing on Glaxion and Gammacor.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.2.3
patchlogs.changes: Tweaked the Synoid Gammacor's force feedback to be more consistent when using a controller.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.11.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Gammacor expanding when holstered and sprinting.
Fixed the Synoid Gammacor holster position appearing on the floor for Cephalon Suda operatives.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.4.2 + 19.4.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Holster appearing on the ground between the feet of Cephalon Suda Operatives wielding Gammacors.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Amprex, Flux Rifle, Glaxion, Embolist, Gammacor series, Nukor, Spectra, Panthera, Synapse, Sobek, Drakgoon and Lanka can now be used in Conclave!

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Right Dendra forearm guard clipping through arm mounted weapons like the Sonicor and Gammacor.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.8.2
patchlogs.changes: •    Decreased the rumble amount on controllers when continuously firing the Atomos, Gammacor, Glaxion, and Amprex.•    Changed the damage radius of hull breaches in Corpus tilesets to affect the entire room, not just a small area near the breach. Fixing in another Hotfix.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Sonicor/Gammacor holsters using the wrong energy colour.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some instances of the Synoid Gammacor’s beam lingering after use.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.2
patchlogs.changes: Made some adjustments to audio FX on the Gammacor.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: ·         Fixed visual issue with Gammacor where weapon would open while holstered after melee or a quick roll.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Sanctuary
patchlogs.changes:
Synoid Gammacor now consumes 7.5x more ammunition.
Synoid Gammacor magazine capacity has been reduced.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.7.0 Nova Prime
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Ruinous Extension Mod not being compatible with the Gammacor and Synoid Gammacor.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.8
patchlogs.changes:
Fixed the non-Syndicate Gammacor being a tradeable weapon.
Fixed Gammacor’s laser not appearing when fired.
Fixed issue with Gammacor caused by using the Barrel Diffusion, Lethal Torrent and Seeker Mods all at once.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.6
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Gammacor’s beam visual effect persisting when using melee during a slide.
Fixed Gammacor’s continuous fire sometimes using default energy color when players stop running while shooting.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.5
patchlogs.changes:
Gammacor Damage: Now 50 Magnetic
Gammacor Status/Second: 5%
Gammacor Magazine: 50
Gammacor Crit Multiplier/Chance: 1.5x/5%.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Made additional tweaks to Gammacor firing sounds.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.1
patchlogs.changes:
Made various sound tweaks to Gammacor shots.
Added new hip fire poses to the Gammacor.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Gammacor appearing in the codex as a duplicate ‘Lato’ entry.
